---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Sai Sony Malapati"
date: "2026-03-09"
output:
  word_document: default
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
```{r}
# Load the tidyverse package 
library(tidyverse)

# 1. Load the dataset
co2_raw <- read_csv("cleaned_co2_data_20vars.csv")

# 2. Filter years, clean regions, and select EXACTLY 20 variables
clean_co2 <- co2_raw %>%
  # Keep only actual countries
  filter(!is.na(iso_code)) %>%
  
  # Filter for the year 1990 onwards
  filter(year >= 1990) %>%
  
  # Select 20 variables:
  select(
    # --- Identifiers (3) ---
    country, year, iso_code, 
    
    # --- Economics & Demographics (2) ---
    population, gdp, 
    
    # --- Energy (3) ---
    primary_energy_consumption, energy_per_capita, energy_per_gdp,
    
    # --- Overall Emissions (4) ---
    co2, co2_per_capita, total_ghg, consumption_co2,
    
    # --- Gas/Emission Types (5) ---
    methane, nitrous_oxide, cement_co2, flaring_co2, trade_co2,
    
    # --- Source Specific (3) ---
    coal_co2, gas_co2, oil_co2
  )

# 3. Handle Missing Values (Keep only rows that have data for all 20 variables)
final_clean_data_20 <- clean_co2 %>%
  drop_na()

# 4. Verify the final dataset
cat("\nDimensions of the 20-variable cleaned dataset:\n")
dim(final_clean_data_20)

# Save the brand new 20-variable dataset to your computer
write_csv(final_clean_data_20, "cleaned_co2_data_20vars.csv")
sum(is.na(final_clean_data_20))
```
```{r}
```


```{r}
summary(co2_raw)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
```


```{r}
ggplot(co2_raw, aes(x = co2_per_capita)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
ggplot(co2_raw, aes(x = gdp, y = co2_per_capita)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(co2_raw, aes(x = year, y = co2)) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_minimal()
```
```{r}
library(corrplot)

cor_matrix <- cor(co2_raw[, sapply(co2_raw, is.numeric)])
corrplot(cor_matrix, method = "color")
```
```{r}
ggplot(co2_raw, aes(x = coal_co2)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30)
```
```{r}
ggplot(co2_raw, aes(y = co2_per_capita)) +
  geom_boxplot()
```
```{r}
ggplot(co2_raw, aes(x = country, y = co2_per_capita)) +
  geom_boxplot()
```
